name: Haunting Guise

passives.name: Madness
passives.effects: For each second in combat with enemy champions, deal 2% increased damage, stacking up to 3 times for a total of 6%.

effects_structured.raw: For each second in combat with enemy champions, deal 2% increased damage, stacking up to 3 times for a total of 6%.

simpleDescription: Deals additional physical damage when ambushing enemies

schema_notes.effects_structured: Parsed from passive/active text for simulation use.
context_notes: Execution-semantics review: Madness adds one damage-amplification stack each second while in champion combat, up to three stacks (6% total).
Player-visible behavior: the damage amplification ramps over time in combat rather than applying all at once.
Page notes indicate Madness stacks multiplicatively with other damage multipliers and should not amplify true damage.

sources.name: Data Dragon item dataset

sources.used_for: secondary validation against canonical static item data mirror
local ingestion snapshot used during structured effect authoring

sources.name: League of Legends Wiki - Haunting Guise
